pitch_desc: Architectural view of the biosensor. Separated layers for material integration analysis.
report_empty: Configure the material architecture and run the simulation to generate the thermodynamic and structural diagnostic.
err_fill_layers: Fill all architecture layers to simulate.
err_mechanics: Environment requires flexible conformation, but base material ({{material}}) exhibits rigid/brittle behavior.
ok_mechanics: Structural integrity and flexibility guaranteed by {{material}}.
err_electrical: Circuit failure. {{material}} is an insulator lacking adequate electron mobility.
err_thermal: {{material}} in encapsulation causes excessive thermal dissipation to the epidermis.
ok_thermal: Thermal stability and insulation guaranteed by {{material}}.
reason_mech_fail: The environment requires flexible conformation, but the material's elastic modulus ({{modulus}} GPa) characterizes brittle behavior under bending stress.
reason_mech_pass: Structural integrity compatible with the environment's mechanical stress limits.
reason_elec_fail: The circuit layer requires free electrons. The selected material has negligible conductivity ({{conductivity}} S/m) and a bandgap of {{bandgap}} eV.
reason_elec_pass: High electron mobility guaranteed by energy band overlap.
reason_therm_struct_fail: The simulated ambient temperature ({{envTemp}}°C) exceeds the thermal degradation point of one of the layers (Stack Limit: {{limitTemp}}°C).
reason_therm_struct_pass: Lattice agitation stability guaranteed within the operating temperature margin.
reason_fourier_fail: Critical conduction gradient. The thermal conductivity ratio ({{ratio}}) indicates heat flux trapping. The encapsulation acts as a severe insulator, inducing a Choke effect.
reason_fourier_pass: Calibrated heat transfer gradient. No imminent risk of collapse due to lattice energy accumulation.
reason_mag_fail: The material exhibits {{behavior}} behavior. Aligned magnetic domains shield or distort the propagation of IoT telemetry electromagnetic waves.
reason_mag_pass: Inert magnetic permeability. Does not cause radio frequency signal attenuation.
reason_optic_fail: The optical system requires light transmittance in the visible range. The material's valence electrons absorb incident photons, generating opacity.
reason_optic_pass: Refractive index and electronic absorption allow the free propagation of photons.
reason_bio_fail: The layers in direct contact with the environment generate cytotoxic reactions or trigger an immune response from the host organism.
reason_corr_fail: The material's electrochemical potential will result in anodic dissolution (severe corrosion) given the salinity and acidity of the selected operating environment.
reason_corr_pass: Excellent chemical passivation against external oxidizing agents.
